whole_model_parity.definition: A Rust executable consumes WRF initialization and matches an upstream integration trajectory.

areas.evidence: UPSTREAM.toml and scripts/fetch-wrf.sh pin and verify WRF v4.7.1.
areas.next_gate: Retarget only through an explicit issue and compatibility audit.

areas.evidence: All 93 active Test1 cases and both Fortran interfaces match the golden output.
areas.next_gate: Add cases when later WRF callers expose untested behavior.

areas.evidence: Typed dimspec, state, and rconfig parsing plus six exact generated-artifact goldens.
areas.next_gate: Includes, conditionals, packages, typedefs, communication entries, and remaining generators.

areas.evidence: Exact task_for_point.c decomposition, period.c parity, and deterministic local and four-rank MPI results.
areas.next_gate: Generated communication descriptors, multi-field aggregation, nesting, and broader process grids.

areas.evidence: Dependency-closed dry, acoustic, and specified-boundary kernels have direct pinned-Fortran parity; the local acoustic trajectory matches 2,196 selected final values; the complete three-stage dry large-step boundary sequence (first-substep relaxation, tendency assembly, boundary assignment) is composed behind one failure-atomic capability.
areas.next_gate: Compose specified updates and halo exchange around the verified acoustic trajectory.

areas.evidence: Kessler warm-rain microphysics matches all 660 mutable oracle values with deterministic worker counts and bounded scratch.
areas.next_gate: Microphysics driver and Registry moisture-species mapping, then a precipitation trajectory.

areas.evidence: The minimum typed ARW schema writes independently comparable restart metadata and field bits.
areas.next_gate: Full Registry-selected state, alarms, NetCDF-4 policy, and resumed-trajectory parity.
Create separate workstreams after the ARW baseline.

areas.evidence: No Rust executable trajectory accepted yet.
